name: ether.fi
special_mechanism_summary: eETH is a rebasing LRT tracking ETH staking plus EigenLayer restaking rewards; weETH is its accumulating wrapper with exchange rate weETH.getEETHByWeETH(). The protocol issues validator keys non-custodially and supports multi-layer wrapping: ETH → eETH → weETH, which can then be deposited into lending protocols as collateral.
notes: C3' combination potential: weETH exchange rate consumed by Aave, Spark for collateral valuation — the AVS reward component is variable and protocols pricing weETH using only ETH staking rate may undervalue it; multi-layer wrapping (ETH → eETH → weETH → Aave collateral) creates a deep composability chain where changes at any layer propagate; April 2026 Kelp exploit demonstrated correlated systemic risk across restaking LRT sector.
